title: Activation Functions
description: A comprehensive guide to all 31 PyTorch activation functions — from foundational ReLU variants to smooth modern activations, gating mechanisms, and advanced NLP functions. Covers formulas, gradient analysis, and side-by-side PyTorch and TensorFlow implementations.

readings.title: What Is an Activation Function?
readings.description: The role of non-linearity, backpropagation chain rule, vanishing/dying gradient problems, and a practical selection guide.

readings.title: The ReLU Family
readings.description: ReLU, LeakyReLU, PReLU, RReLU, and ReLU6 — gradients, dying neurons, and quantization-friendly bounds.

readings.title: Saturating Activations
readings.description: Sigmoid, Tanh, Hardsigmoid, Hardtanh, Softsign, and LogSigmoid — vanishing gradients and zero-centering.

readings.title: Smooth Modern Activations
readings.description: GELU, SiLU/Swish, Mish, ELU, CELU, and SELU — smooth gates, self-normalization, and modern architecture choices.

readings.title: Gating & Normalization
readings.description: GLU, Hardswish, Softmax, LogSoftmax, Softmax2d, and Softmin — gating mechanisms and probability normalization.

readings.title: Shrinkage & Threshold Functions
readings.description: Hardshrink, Softshrink, Tanhshrink, Threshold, and Softplus — sparsity promotion and smooth ReLU approximations.

readings.title: NLP & Advanced Activations
readings.description: LogSigmoid, AdaptiveLogSoftmax, MultiheadAttention, and SwiGLU — large-vocabulary NLP and transformer architectures.

labs.title: Activation Functions in PyTorch
labs.description: Implement all activations from scratch, run the dying ReLU experiment, benchmark compute costs, and compare convergence on CIFAR-10.

labs.title: Activation Functions in TensorFlow
labs.description: Custom Keras layers for Mish, GLU, and SwiGLU, parity check vs PyTorch, and Fashion-MNIST activation comparison.
